title: Shopify Development Expert & E-Commerce Specialist
tagline: Building high-converting Shopify stores that drive revenue
bio: Specialized Shopify developer with 5+ years building custom themes, headless commerce solutions, and high-converting online stores. Expert in Liquid templating, Shopify Plus, custom apps, and third-party integrations. 90+ stores launched generating over ₹500 Cr+ in combined GMV. From D2C startups to enterprise brands, I build stores that sell.

highlights: Built 15+ custom Shopify stores with bespoke themes, Liquid templates, and third-party integrations
Deliver conversion-optimized Shopify Plus solutions for D2C brands generating ₹10 Cr+ monthly revenue
Developed custom Shopify apps for inventory management, pricing automation, and analytics
Provide e-commerce consulting for startup teams on store architecture and growth strategies
Led the mobile checkout redesign increasing conversion rate by 18% across 200M+ user base
Deep expertise in e-commerce UX patterns, cart optimization, and payment flows
Built seller-facing tools used by 500K+ merchants for real-time inventory management
Applied Flipkart-scale e-commerce learnings to Shopify store optimization strategies
Built payment integration SDKs now used in thousands of Shopify stores via Razorpay plugin
Expert in Indian payment gateways: UPI, netbanking, cards, wallets, and EMI
Developed merchant analytics dashboard for real-time transaction monitoring
Implemented PCI-DSS compliant payment flows and fraud detection systems
Built e-commerce features for Paytm Mall serving 100M+ users
Developed QR code payment flows now standard in Indian e-commerce
Experience with high-scale transaction processing (5M+ daily)
Optimized checkout flows for low-bandwidth Indian market conditions

projects.title: LuxeThread
projects.subtitle: Premium D2C Fashion Store
projects.description: High-end fashion e-commerce store with custom Liquid theme, multi-currency support, and AI-powered product recommendations. Integrated with 200+ D2C brands, featuring virtual try-on, size recommender, and loyalty program. Achieved 4.2% conversion rate (industry avg: 1.4%).

projects.title: FreshBasket
projects.subtitle: Grocery & Essentials Store
projects.description: Subscription-based grocery delivery store with automated reordering, delivery slot management, and hyper-local inventory sync across 50+ dark stores.

projects.title: CraftKulture
projects.subtitle: Artisan Marketplace
projects.description: Multi-vendor marketplace connecting 2,000+ Indian artisans with global buyers. Custom Shopify app for vendor onboarding, commission tracking, and shipping coordination.

projects.title: GlowSkin
projects.subtitle: Beauty & Skincare D2C Brand
projects.description: Conversion-optimized beauty store with quiz-based product recommender, subscription boxes, and UGC-driven social proof. A/B tested 40+ variants to achieve 3.8% conversion rate.

projects.title: PetPalace
projects.subtitle: Pet Supplies Subscription Store
projects.description: Subscription-first pet supplies store with auto-replenishment, pet profile management, and vet-recommended product bundles. Built custom ReCharge integration for flexible subscription management.

caseStudy.problem: Premium fashion brand needed a Shopify Plus store that matched their luxury positioning while supporting multi-currency checkout for UAE, India, and US markets.
caseStudy.solution: Built a fully custom Liquid theme with advanced product filtering, AI size recommender, virtual try-on, and localized checkout experiences for 3 markets.
challenges: Custom theme matching luxury brand guidelines pixel-perfect
Page speed score 95+ despite heavy imagery
